The weather transitioned from broken clouds to several clear days, followed by a period of overcast skies and light rain on January 5th. Winds remained generally light, though gustiness increased toward the end of the period, peaking at 14.48 m/s on January 8th.

In Saint James, temperatures will fluctuate between a high of 6.99°C and a low of -3.56°C. The forecast begins with clear skies, transitioning to overcast conditions with periods of light snow and rain between January 5th and 7th. Winds will remain moderate, with gusts peaking around 12.82 m/s by January 8th.

In Rio Chico, temperatures will fluctuate between a low of 23.01°C and a high of 30.28°C from January 3rd to 8th. The period is characterized by high humidity (up to 95%) and frequent light rain, particularly on the mornings of January 4th, 5th, 6th, 7th, and 8th. Skies will vary between clear, scattered clouds, and overcast conditions, with light winds throughout.

In Semeljci, weather will transition from mild, cloudy conditions with occasional light rain (temps between 6°C and 14°C) through January 6th, to a significant cold snap by January 8th. Temperatures will drop sharply to a low of -1.24°C, with precipitation shifting from rain to snow starting the evening of January 7th, accompanied by reduced visibility and breezy conditions.

In Betz, temperatures will steadily decline from a high of around 10°C on January 3rd to near or below freezing by January 8th. The period begins with frequent light rain and overcast skies, transitioning to mostly cloudy conditions with a shift toward light snow and significantly colder feels-like temperatures (reaching as low as -5.6°C) by the end of the forecast.

In Ébano (Colonia Veinte de Noviembre), temperatures will fluctuate between a low of 15.73°C and a peak of 28.62°C. The period begins with broken and overcast clouds, transitioning to clear skies around January 5th and 6th, before returning to overcast conditions by January 7th. Humidity will vary significantly, peaking at 96% and dropping to 36% during the warmest period.

In Pyhäjoki, temperatures will start extremely cold, hovering around -26°C from January 3rd to 6th with overcast to broken clouds. A significant warming trend begins on January 7th, with temperatures rising sharply to a high of -3.66°C by January 8th. Winds will generally increase during this warming period, peaking with gusts up to 13.51 m/s on the evening of January 7th.

Weather in Târgu Trotuş will transition from mild, overcast conditions with temperatures peaking at 12.6°C on January 4th to a significant cold snap starting January 7th. This shift brings heavy snow and a sharp temperature drop, reaching a low of -7.2°C by January 8th, accompanied by poor visibility and consistent snowfall.

Nakskov will experience a significant cooling trend from January 3rd to 8th, starting with moderate rain and temperatures around 6°C and dropping to sub-zero temperatures. The weather transitions from rain to light snow on January 4th, followed by several days of overcast skies and persistent cold, with lows reaching -2.75°C. Conditions improve toward January 8th, ending with clear skies and temperatures hovering around -1°C.
